item.title: About Me
item.description:
Aleksandr Gyumushyan Link to heading

About Me Link to heading

I’m a passionate Junior Software Developer with a strong foundation in computer science and a drive to build scalable, efficient solutions. I specialize in backend development, distributed systems, and cloud technologies.

Skills & Technologies Link to heading

Programming Languages Link to heading

  • Python - Web development, data analysis, automation
  • Go - High-performance services, microservices
  • Java - Enterprise applications, Spring Boot
  • C# - .NET development, desktop applications

Technologies & Tools Link to heading

  • Distributed Systems - Microservices architecture, message queues
  • Cloud Platforms - AWS, Docker, Kubernetes
  • Databases - PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB
  • Development Tools - Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines
  • Monitoring - Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack

Areas of Expertise Link to heading

  • Microservices Architecture - Designing and implementing scalable service-oriented systems
  • API Development - RESTful APIs, GraphQL, gRPC
  • DevOps Practices - Infrastructure as Code, automated deployments
  • Performance Optimization - Database optimization, caching strategies

Experience Link to heading

I’m currently focused on building robust, scalable applications that can handle real-world challenges. My experience includes:

item.title: My First Blog Post: Building a Microservice Architecture
item.description:
Building a Microservice Architecture Link to heading

Recently, I’ve been working on a project that required building a scalable microservice architecture. This post will walk through the key decisions and implementation details that made this project successful.

The Challenge Link to heading

Our team needed to build a system that could handle thousands of concurrent users while maintaining high availability and low latency. After evaluating different architectural patterns, we decided to go with a microservice approach using Go and Docker.

item.title: Photography
item.description:
Photography Portfolio Link to heading

Welcome to my photography collection! Here you’ll find a curated selection of my work, ranging from street photography to landscapes and portraits.

Street Photography Link to heading

Capturing the essence of urban life through candid moments and architectural details.

Landscape Photography Link to heading

Exploring the natural world and finding beauty in the simplest of scenes.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Projects Link to heading

Here’s a collection of projects I’ve worked on, showcasing my skills in software development, system design, and problem-solving.

Featured Projects Link to heading

Microservice API Gateway Link to heading

Technologies: Go, Docker, gRPC, PostgreSQL

A high-performance API gateway built with Go that handles authentication, rate limiting, and request routing for a microservice architecture. Features include:
